briefdescription.para: Prevent circular inclusions by using protection macros.

detaileddescription.para: < The VER is the first peripheral on the local bus
PIO (Parallel Interface) peripheral register offsets The PIO is the first peripheral on the local bus

briefdescription.para: PIO In Event Rising Edge Register offset.
PIO In Event Falling Edge Register offset.
PIO In Pixel packing phase mask.
PIO In Pixel packing phase shift.

detaileddescription.para: DDC (Display Data Channel) peripheral register offsets The DDC is the second peripheral on the local bus

briefdescription.para: DDC State of SCL Input mask.
DDC State of SDA Input mask.
AUD Clock Regeneration CTS * Register offset.
AUD Clock Regeneration N * Register offset.
This macro reads a value from a HDMI TX register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit read is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is read from the register. The most significant data will be read as 0.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDMI TX core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file).

simplesect.para: C-style signature: u32 XV_HdmiTx_ReadReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset)

briefdescription.para: This macro writes a value to a HDMI TX register.

detaileddescription.para: A 32 bit write is performed. If the component is implemented in a smaller width, only the least significant data is written.

parameterdescription.para: is the base address of the HDMI TX core instance.
is the register offset of the register (defined at the top of this file) to be written.
is the 32-bit value to write into the register.

simplesect.para: C-style signature: void XV_HdmiTx_WriteReg(UINTPTR BaseAddress, u32 RegOffset, u32 Data)

briefdescription.para: This header file contains identifiers and register-level core functions (or macros) that can be used to access the Xilinx HDMI TX core.

detaileddescription.para: For more information about the operation of this core see the hardware specification and documentation in the higher level driver xv_hdmitx.h file.

para.preformatted:
Ver Who Date Changes
1.00 10/07/15 Initial release. 1.01 YH 25/07/16 Used UINTPTR instead of u32 for BaseAddress XV_HdmiTx_WriteReg XV_HdmiTx_ReadReg 1.02 YH 14/11/16 Added BRIDGE_YUV420 and BRIDGE_PIXEL mask to PIO Out 1.03 MG 06/03/17 Added XV_HDMITX_AUX_STA_PKT_RDY_MASK 1.04 MMO 03/05/17 Updated the comments for XV_HdmiTx_ReadReg and XV_HdmiTx_WriteReg 1.1 MG 03/05/17 Introduced video mask peripheral 1.2 YH 22/08/17 Added XV_HDMITX_AUD_CTRL_AUDFMT_MASK (Audio Format) 1.3 YH 06/10/17 Added XV_HDMITX_AUD_CTRL_AUDFMT_SHIFT (Audio Format) 1.4 YH 16/01/18 Added PIO_OUT for dedicated reset for each clock domain Added PIO_IN to bridge unlock interrupt Added PIO_OUT to set GCP_AVMUTE 1.5 MMO 11/08/18 Added PIO_IN to bridge overflow and underflow interrupt EB 14/08/18 Added XV_HDMITX_HPD_TIMEGRID_OFFSET, XV_HDMITX_TOGGLE_CONF_OFFSET and XV_HDMITX_CONNECT_CONF_OFFSET
